# Eric Caskey

Platform engineer. I build the systems other engineers depend on.

I work on safety-critical workflow orchestration at Amazon, where I architect a platform maintaining 3 million active monitors and powering 500,000 daily automated actions across a global fleet. Before that I spent nine years at Prudential Financial building MFA self-service and VPN automation for 60,000 corporate users.

This site is the personal front door — career, how to reach me, a short reading shelf. For long-form engineering writing, case studies, and the tools I have built, see Caskey Engineering at https://caskeycoding.com.

- Home: https://ericcaskey.com
- About: https://ericcaskey.com/about
- Work: https://ericcaskey.com/work
- Writing: https://ericcaskey.com/writing
- Contact: https://ericcaskey.com/contact
- Engineering brand: https://caskeycoding.com
